name: Ages of Stars and Frost
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a monster(s) you control was destroyed by your Spell effect or your opponent's card effect and sent to the GY this turn: You can conduct your next Battle Phase twice. If a monster you control is shuffled into the Deck or returned to the Extra Deck face-down, while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Ages of Stars and Frost" once per turn.
eff: If a monster(s) you control was destroyed by your Spell effect or your opponent's card effect and sent to the GY this turn: You can conduct your next Battle Phase twice. If a monster you control is shuffled into the Deck or returned to the Extra Deck face-down, while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Ages of Stars and Frost" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
